calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Set For Trial On Jan-21-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Declaration In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Nov-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HARTFORD UNDERWRITERS INSURANCE COMPANY's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reclassify

Granted. There is a "possibility the damages will exceed $25,000." Ytuarte v. Superior Court (2005) 129 Cal.App.4th 266, 279 (emphasis in original). Concomitantly, the court cannot find that the action will "necessarily" result in a verdict of $25,000 or less. Stern v. Superior Court (2003) 105 Cal.App.4th 223, 233. There is no undue delay: it appears from the Opposition that it was not until August 2023 that a settlement for more than $100,000 was proposed, and by October 6 of this year (see Opposition at 3-4) it became clear that plaintiff had paid over $141,000. This shows both good cause for reclassification and an explanation for the timing of the present motion.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Curtis E. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
